title: Day 7 Lesson 2 - Video Repetition
html:
The focus of this repetition is on these four sentences:  

Sentence 1 - いつ　にほんへ　きました　か。 (itsu nihon e kimashita ka) = When did you come to Japan?

Sentence 2 - さんがつ　じゅうごにちに　きました。 (sangatsu juugonichi ni kimashita) = March 15th.

Sentence ３ - いつ　くにへ　かえります　か。 (itsu kuni e kaerimasu ka) = When are you going back home?

Sentence 4 - らいねん　かえります。 (rainen kaerimas) = Next year.

How to use this lesson - When the repeat message shows and the video pauses, please repeat the sentence you have just heard.  Keep practising until you can repeat perfectly!
